rows.Product: Dried Herring Fish ã Item #AF4110, Lot Code 26020, expiration 2028-12-06, 7 oz (198 g) clear plastic packaging with blue trim. 69 cases recalled. Manufactured in Vietnam; imported. Distributed to Asian grocery stores in AZ, CA, FL, HI, IL, KS, LA, MD, MO, NC, NH, NV, NY, OK, PA, TX, UT (17 states).
rows.Reason: Voluntary recall ã product was not adequately eviscerated. Sale of uneviscerated fish is prohibited under New York State Agriculture and Markets regulations because Clostridium botulinum spores are concentrated in viscera. Issue identified during routine NY DAM regulatory testing. No illnesses reported to date.
rows.Notes: Company Announcement 2026-06-02; FDA Publish 2026-06-04. Origin Vietnam (imported product). Sister recall to R761 Prime Food Processing Dried Croaker Fish (2026-02-05) ã same firm, recurring uneviscerated-fish issue.
